firecrawl.markdown:
Highland Park High School Strings
=================================

[Ver todos los eventos](https://visitasevilla.es/ahora-en-sevilla/)

25.03.26 ![](http://tic.visitasevilla.es/vsev/web_php/imatges/esdeveniments/32399699e21c430d7a488221128.jpg)

La formación orquestal Highland Park High School Strings, procedente de Illinois (EE. UU.), ofrecerá un concierto matinal en la Iglesia de San Jacinto bajo la dirección de Remington Clark.

El programa incluye obras de G. Rossini, G. Holst, P. Warlock y otros compositores, interpretadas por jóvenes músicos con sólida formación académica y amplia experiencia en giras internacionales. Este concierto permite disfrutar de repertorio sinfónico en un entorno patrimonial de gran valor arquitectónico, combinando talento emergente y escenario histórico. Una propuesta cultural accesible y abierta al público general.

**Entrada libre hasta completar aforo**

Lo que necesitas saber está en tu correo

hasDescription.longDescription: The orchestral group Highland Park High School Strings, from Illinois (USA), will offer a morning concert at the Church of San Jacinto under the direction of Remington Clark. The program includes works by G. Rossini, G. Holst, P. Warlock, and other composers, performed by young musicians with solid academic training and extensive experience in international tours.
hasDescription.shortDescription: Morning concert by the Highland Park High School Strings orchestra.

Event.hasAcknowledgement: Free entry until full capacity is reached

hasAdditionalInformation.curiosities: Combination of emerging talent and historic stage.

frequentlyAskedQuestion.question: Is it necessary to reserve a ticket?
frequentlyAskedQuestion.answer: No, entry is free until full capacity is reached.

hasAdditionalInformation.remarks: Cultural proposal accessible and open to the general public.
